What do you recommend when choosing between different sizes? The distance between the outlet and the resting position are key to check when choosing the length of your new hose for you bathroom. Typically a hose within a bathtub tends to be shorter 1.2m or 1.5m. For shower situation it’s often above 1.5m. What is twist stop doing? The feature makes using a hand shower frustration free as the hose doesn’t get twisted and feel must more natural when using it. One you have used a twist stop you will wonder how you ever showered without using one. Why are some of the Grohe hoses called long life? Grohe produces products for homes and commercial environment like hotel and Health clubs. Typically commercial environments have much higher usage and pressure exerted on them so the long life are perfect for this. Does it work with non GROHE Showers or hand showers? Yes as GROHE hoses have an universal connection G 1/2" x 1/2".
